# Governed brand change

Implement the requested MarkZ visual change as a design-system change.

1. Read [the design system](../../docs/DESIGN-SYSTEM.md), [the benchmark matrix](../../docs/SYSTEM-BENCHMARKS.md), and [the token source](../../design-system/tokens.json).
2. Identify the authority and every generated artifact affected.
3. Update tokens or the shared component, incrementing the asset revision when images change.
4. Run generation, design checks, unit tests, build checks, and browser quality checks.
5. Inspect blog and notes home/article pages across required viewports and themes.
6. Record durable user corrections in the decision log and deterministic checks.

Return changed authorities, generated outputs, commands, browser evidence, and remaining risk.
